title: CAPEX Category Buyer (Pharmaceutical/ Procurement)
description:
CAPEX Category Buyer (Pharmaceutical/ Procurement)


12 Months Contract

Location: Tuas

Up to $7,000 depending on experience

Industry: Pharmaceutical


Job Purpose

  • To obtain operational support from the CapEx Leader Buyer of the project on the Singapore scope of the EVF project.
  • The CapEx Buyer's perimeter includes the following categories: Engineering Benefits; Equipment; Construction.
  • The buyer will be in charge of promoting and implementing the Procurement strategy and implementing the most appropriate levers to achieve the expected performance criteria.
  • Ensure operational excellence in purchasing (Total Cost of Ownership, Supplier Relationship Management, Market Analysis, Risk Management, Innovation, CSR, HSE, Compliance, Quality, etc.)


Responsibilities:

  • Support to Project Leader Capex Buyer in the major RFP process for Equipment and Capex:
  • Contribute to the organization of the tendering process: sets up and participates in supplier meetings, facilitates communication with suppliers, consolidates supplier and internal issues in order to facilitate the alignment phase of bids;
  • Prepares analysis of commercial offers, identifies trading levers and contributes to price, services and contract negotiations
  • Data analysis/ market intelligence:
  • Collects, consolidates and shapes internal benchmark data (excel, ppt) and KPIs from company’s previous investment projects;
  • Collecting, consolidating and shaping data (excel, ppt) for the supplier market in France and abroad;
  • Contributes to the day-to-day operational activity of the project: supports specific RFQs, negotiates and contracts;
  • Contributes to the transition to an outsourced platform for Professional Services (Engineering)
  • Helps consolidate the information needed for financial reporting

Business Partnering:

  • Adopt the right level of communication within the Project and with the Buyers community
  • Positioning yourself as a facilitator
  • A key factor in success for this mission is the ability to work closely, collaboratively and reactivatedly with the CapEx Buyer Leader project and Business Partners


Requirements:

  • Diploma or engineering studies with at least 3+ years experience as Procurement buyer for large Capex/Equipment project (>15M Euro
  • Very good command of Excel and PowerPoint tools
  • Ability to work as a team, analytical skills, rigour, autonomy


Lim Pey Chyi - Apple.lim@manpower.com.sg

Recruitment Consultant (R2090579)

Manpower Staffing Services (S) Pte Ltd

EA Licence: 02C3423

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)
